title: task_plan — harnessed v5.0 State Machine Core (Spec 1: A/B/C/E/F)
summary: Eight-phase TDD implementation plan adding a progress ledger, fail-closed evidence guard, and status --recover to harnessed's workflow state machine.
notes: Manifest declared DOC (authoritative). Filename task_plan.md and content (phased build plan with acceptance criteria, dependency order, no API/schema contract intended as a spec product) align with DOC. References ADR-0033 for locked decisions but is itself an implementation plan / context doc.
